_comment: REFERENCE ONLY -- not a live project manifest.
The VRChat Creator Companion (VCC) writes the authoritative vpm-manifest.json
when you Create New World; let it resolve the latest versions. This file just
documents the packages LegaiaDiorama needs. The Worlds SDK bundles UdonSharp,
so com.vrchat.worlds is the only direct dependency.
Version strings below are indicative -- use whatever VCC offers as current.
